title: jmap-chat: wire up enums — eliminate stringly-typed spec fields
description: Nine public API fields use String/Vec<String> where the spec defines a finite set of values and an enum already exists or is trivially addable. Groups: (1) wire existing enums into structs that ignore them, (2) add three small enums for spec-defined finite sets. All changes are API-breaking (minor version bump needed); plan to ship as one coordinated release.
notes:
Child issues: jmap-chat-tui-gbg (EndpointType), jmap-chat-tui-4hq (ChatKind), jmap-chat-tui-4br (ContactPresence/SSE), jmap-chat-tui-e3s (ChatStreamDataType), jmap-chat-tui-4ad (PushUrgency), jmap-chat-tui-6v1c (QuotaScope)
Review converged after 3 round(s). Final review: jmap-chat-tui-dfw6.
